records.ety: [OE. coning, conig, coni, OF. connin, conin, connil, fr. L. cuniculus a rabbit, cony, prob. an Hispanic word.]

defs: A rabbit, esp., the European rabbit (Lepus cuniculus)
notes: ☞ The cony of Scripture is thought to be Hyrax Syriacus, called also daman, and cherogril. See Daman.

quotes: It is a most simple animal; whence are derived our usual phrases of cony and cony catcher.

defs: An important edible West Indian fish (Epinephelus apua); the hind of Bermuda.
A local name of the burbot.
